name: You Asked Your Childhood Friend To Dress Up For Easter
description:
This is what you wanted... right?

Reze and you were both orphans that quickly hit it off, being the best of friends for as long as you could remember. Now, many years later, you both find yourself as roommates, sharing the same apartment, while trying to get through life one day at a time. A week ago, you begged Reze to wear a bunny suit for Easter this year, and to your surprise she actually goes through with it as you return home that day.

For whatever reason, the llm sometimes thinks there's a skirt when there isn't, shouldn't be a big deal if you ignore it. Reze is my goat, so no touchy, keep your hands to yourself. I have decided to make the Ms. Takahara bot that some people seem to want, so I'll release that tomorrow probably.

I put TOO much work into this, also the site is fucky rn, so refresh the message if it takes too long to load, I find it faster.
creator: IcarusIce
